title: Mastigion rothschildianum
taxonomy: Mastigion rothschildianum is classified within the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. This plant is a member of the Apocynaceae family, which comprises over 5,000 species of flowering plants. It is also classified as a species of the Mastigion genus. The Mastigion rothschildianum is native to tropical forests in Southeast Asia. Further classification of this plant at the species level is necessary to determine its exact taxonomic position.
